title: Hire: Chidi Anagonye (legal-expert-sports-ip)
description: Okay team, big decision time. We do not have anybody on the squad who can tell us whether using a club crest or a player photo will explode into a legal flamewar. That's not good. I am hiring a Senior Legal Counsel specialized in sports IP because this is critical to shipping the MVP in 48 hours. Chidi (analytical, ethical) will give us the rigorous, evidence-backed guidance we need: a risk classification for every asset, clear next steps (from use-with-attribution to obtain-license or delete), and contract clause templates. In short: protect the company, unblock the product, and avoid lawsuits. That's what she said. (Also: it's the right hire.)
